title: "Hull City Earn Promotion to Premier League with Championship Play-Off Win"

    **Hull City has secured promotion to the Premier League after a thrilling Championship play-off final victory over Middlesbrough.**
    
    ## Context / Background
    The highly anticipated match between Hull City and Middlesbrough took place, with both teams vying for a spot in the Premier League. The Championship play-off final is one of the most significant matches in English football, offering the winner a lucrative promotion to the top tier.

    ## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
    | Team | Goals | Possession |
    | --- | --- | --- |
    | Hull City | 1 | 45% |
    | Middlesbrough | 0 | 55% |
    The match was closely contested, with Hull City ultimately emerging victorious thanks to a stoppage-time winner from Oli McBurnie.

    > The goal from Oli McBurnie was the decisive moment in the match, securing Hull City's promotion to the Premier League.

    ## What's Next?
    With their promotion to the Premier League, Hull City will face a new set of challenges in the upcoming season. They will need to adapt quickly to the top tier and prepare for the intense competition that awaits them.
